fields.SYSTEM_SOURCE_NO: 系统分类（RIS=放射科, EIS=内镜科, UIS=超声科, PIS=病理科, NMS=核医学科）
fields.EXAM_TASK_STATUS: 任务状态（20=创建, 40=检查中, 50=完成, 60=审核, 70=发布）
fields.IS_DEL: 删除标志（0=未删除, 1=已删除）
删除标志（0=未删除, 1=已删除）
删除标志（0=未删除, 1=已删除）

query_templates.total_count: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EXAM_TASK t JOIN EXAM_REPORT r ON t.EXAM_TASK_ID = r.EXAM_TASK_ID WHERE t.IS_DEL=0 AND r.IS_DEL=0 AND t.SYSTEM_SOURCE_NO='@system' AND t.EXAM_TASK_STATUS>=50 AND CAST(t.REGISTER_AT AS DATE)='@date' AND @doctor_field IS NOT NULL
query_templates.by_category: SELECT t.EXAM_CATEGORY_NAME, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM EXAM_TASK t JOIN EXAM_REPORT r ON t.EXAM_TASK_ID = r.EXAM_TASK_ID WHERE t.IS_DEL=0 AND r.IS_DEL=0 AND t.SYSTEM_SOURCE_NO='@system' AND t.EXAM_TASK_STATUS>=50 AND CAST(t.REGISTER_AT AS DATE)='@date' AND @doctor_field IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.EXAM_CATEGORY_NAME ORDER BY Count DESC
query_templates.by_doctor: SELECT @doctor_field AS 医生, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM EXAM_TASK t JOIN EXAM_REPORT r ON t.EXAM_TASK_ID = r.EXAM_TASK_ID WHERE t.IS_DEL=0 AND r.IS_DEL=0 AND t.SYSTEM_SOURCE_NO='@system' AND t.EXAM_TASK_STATUS>=50 AND CAST(t.REGISTER_AT AS DATE)='@date' AND @doctor_field IS NOT NULL GROUP BY @doctor_field ORDER BY Count DESC
query_templates.by_charge_item: SELECT ri.EXAM_ITEM_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT t.EXAM_TASK_ID) AS Count FROM EXAM_TASK t JOIN EXAM_REPORT r ON t.EXAM_TASK_ID = r.EXAM_TASK_ID LEFT JOIN EXAM_CHARGE_ITEM ri ON t.EXAM_TASK_ID = ri.EXAM_TASK_ID AND ri.IS_DEL=0 WHERE t.IS_DEL=0 AND r.IS_DEL=0 AND t.SYSTEM_SOURCE_NO='@system' AND t.EXAM_TASK_STATUS>=50 AND CAST(t.REGISTER_AT AS DATE)='@date' AND @doctor_field IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ri.EXAM_ITEM_NAME ORDER BY Count DESC
